title: Earning has many shapes
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for when one route to income has been your whole mental map.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 29 of the MONEY program for when the hard-work belief has narrowed what you think earning can look like.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 29 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 29 of the MONEY program. The hard-work belief narrows the picture: earning looks like long hours, visible effort, and a clear labour-to-pay transaction. This affirmation opens the picture without arguing against effort.
Earning has many shapes. I am open to all of them.
Say it three times in the morning, hand on heart if that helps. The intention is not to deny that effort works, but to stop treating effort as the only valid route.
Adapted from Day 29 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
